thor_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7475459635368837950","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看。，我很喜欢像小莲花这样肆意灿烂的女孩子，他从来不会站在别人的角度去考虑什么问题，她只会站在自己的角度对自己最好。她最爱的就是自己，我很喜欢他这一点。在弱小无助的时候呢，只能服从规则，等你有自己的能力了，立马改变规则，制定规则。我超喜欢这样的大女主，这才是真正的大女主，最后的结局有点潦草。
希望可以改进一下，多来一点番外，对二月红不太友好，你也不用穿越这么晚吧，你也会改变时空啊，穿到人家都死了，人家真正的是等了一辈子啊，我们女主太花心了，不过我喜欢[偷笑]。希望作者能够继续更新。我还想看看还有谁到了洪荒","text_exts":[{"e":129,"s":126,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774120404C2458B49%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227475459635368837950%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227296764059842513982%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740530170,"group_id":"7296764059842513982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+Cq4AQxhCaByePjgnLwvBwVocJt03QwWDSH6qmIFH5v","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a6bd9a83d48c43439f4c74ae7a5d3cff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709362&x-signature=zq89RHHQT172uGe%2BRcee3EVtMys%3D","user_id":"2555679644328366","user_name":"万物星辰大海里"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2555679644328366","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646278746,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296764059842513982","book_info":{"abstract":"各花入各眼不喜勿喷！万人迷玛丽苏女主！
